name: Emes the Infinity
name_jp: エメス・ザ・インフィニティ
desc: Each time this card destroys an opponent's monster and sends it to the Graveyard as a result of battle, increase the ATK of this card by 700 points.
mnst_eff: Each time this card destroys an opponent's monster and sends it to the Graveyard as a result of battle, increase the ATK of this card by 700 points.
eff: Each time this card destroys an opponent's monster and sends it to the Graveyard as a result of battle, increase the ATK of this card by 700 points.

sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! Destiny Board Traveler promotional cards

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
